'''Sarno Technologies''' was a company in operation during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was known for its production of a variety of personal-use sporting simulators. One of Sarno Technologies' most popular products was the [[Home Spheroids Simulator]].

{{Company-stub}}
